title: Absorption costing
summary: 9706 — overhead absorption rates, full unit cost, and over/under absorption.
learningObjectives: Allocate and apportion overheads to cost centres.
Prepare profit statements under absorption costing.

simpleExplanation.title: Sharing factory costs
simpleExplanation.summary: Absorption costing spreads all production overheads into product cost using predetermined rates — differences from actual create over/under absorption.

sections.content: **Absorption costing** (2.2.2) — show **OAR calculation** and **adjustment for under/over**.
